name: bookkeepers managing 10–50 clients using QuickBooks tool
description: For bookkeepers managing 10–50 clients using QuickBooks, manual reconciliation causes late financial reporting. We automate transaction matching instead of manual reconciliation processes.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between bank transactions and accounting records
